title: Slovakian Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful Slovakian-inspired stir fry made with a variety of vegetables, perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the Slovakian sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the snow peas and cooked sausage back into the skillet.
In a small bowl, whisk together the savory sauce and stir-fry seasoning.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and sausage, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
